_note: All banter copy. Use {PLAYER}, {TEAM}, {TEAM_A}, {TEAM_B}, {FRIEND}, {PTS}, {RANK}, {TIME}, {ANSWER}, {RUNS} as template vars. Arrays rotate randomly — add more lines to any array and they'll appear automatically.

open: {TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B}. Pick your side before the toss.
Card's open. {TEAM_A} take on {TEAM_B}. What do you know that the others don't?
{TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B}. The group is watching. Make your call.
This one's yours to call. {TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B}.
Match is live. {TEAM_A} take on {TEAM_B}. Clock's not waiting.
locked: Done. Can't change your mind now. Good.
Picks saved. Whatever happens, you called it.
{FRIEND} has spoken. The match will decide.
missed: No card this match. You had time.
Card closed. No picks from you. The group noticed.
Missed the window. {TEAM_A} vs {TEAM_B} kicked off without your picks.
That one got away. Better luck next match.
Zero picks. Zero points. The others are not surprised.

matchWinner: Backing {TEAM}. The group will judge you for this.
theCall: The Call: {ANSWER}. Bold or obvious — we'll see.
villainPick: {PLAYER} is your villain. Hope they flop.
Villain locked: {PLAYER}. Under 10 or 0 wickets and you're laughing.
{PLAYER} is the pick. If they go big, that's on you.
You villain-picked {PLAYER}. One of you will regret this.
{PLAYER}: villain. The match will settle this.
chaosBall: Chaos Ball: {ANSWER}. The match will decide.
You said {ANSWER}. The chaos will reveal itself.
{ANSWER}. Either the match cooperates or it doesn't.
noSquad: Squad not announced yet — villain pick skipped for this match.
No squad data yet. Villain pick won't count this one.
Squads aren't in yet. This pick is sitting out.

justYou: Just you so far. The others are still deciding.
First in. The group hasn't moved yet.
Only your card right now. More coming.
You're the only one who's locked in. Typical.

matchWinnerCorrect: Winner: {TEAM}. {FRIEND} had it. {PTS} points on the board.
matchWinnerWrong: {TEAM} lost. {FRIEND} predicted {TEAM}. {FRIEND} is available for questions.
{TEAM} didn't win. {FRIEND} thought they would. Zero on the winner.
Wrong team. {FRIEND} had {TEAM}. The match disagreed.
{FRIEND} went with {TEAM}. {TEAM} went home. Zero pts.
Backed {TEAM}. {TEAM} didn't show up. The points didn't either.
theCallWrong: Called {ANSWER}. The match had other plans.
villainUnder10: Under 10. {PLAYER} flopped exactly as predicted. +15 pts.
{PLAYER} did nothing. That was the plan. +15 pts.
villainOver30: {PLAYER} scored {RUNS}. Your villain pick cost you 5.
{PLAYER} went big. {RUNS} runs. The villain won. -5.
villainNeutral: {PLAYER} scored {RUNS}. Between 10 and 30. No points, no damage.
{RUNS} for {PLAYER}. Neutral. The villain sat this one out.
{PLAYER}: {RUNS}. Not enough to hurt, not few enough to score.
In the grey zone. {PLAYER} with {RUNS}. Zero either way.
chaosBallCorrect: Chaos Ball: right. The match delivered. +{PTS}.
chaosBallWrong: Chaos Ball missed. That's what chaos means.
Didn't happen. Zero from the Chaos Ball.
Chaos Ball: wrong. The match had other ideas.
The chaos went the other way. Zero.

noCardYet: Nobody's filled their card yet. Typical. {TIME} left.
Empty. The group hasn't moved. {TIME} left.
Still waiting on everyone. {TIME} on the clock.
noMatchesToday: Nothing on today. Check back tomorrow.
The IPL is taking a day off. So can you.
No fixture today. Come back when there's cricket.
seasonPicksEmpty: Season picks aren't locked yet. Opens before the first match.
Fill your season picks before the tournament begins.

header: Match done. Here's how it went.
Full time. Let's see the damage.
Stumps drawn. Time to count the points.
It's over. Let's see who called it.
groupSplit: The group was split. {WINNER_COUNT} right, {LOSER_COUNT} wrong.
h2hWin: {FRIEND} takes the H2H. {OPPONENT} takes the loss.
h2hLoss: H2H lost to {OPPONENT}. They'll mention this.

topOfLeaderboard: #{RANK} in the group. {FRIEND} is on top.
{FRIEND} leads. The others are taking notes.

onboarding.welcome: Pick your team. It sets your colours for the season.
onboarding.teamPicked: Locked in as a {TEAM} fan. Bold choice.
onboarding.displayNamePrompt: What do the others call you?

seasonPicks.open: Season picks are open. Lock them in before the first ball of IPL {YEAR}.
seasonPicks.locked: Season picks locked. See you at the end.
seasonPicks.partiallyFilled: {COUNT} of {TOTAL} categories filled. Finish before the tournament starts.
